demo.title: before-every-send.sh
demo.code:
# Free dry run: the 402 IS the price quote ($0.01 USDC on Base)
curl -i "https://x402-mcp.onrender.com/base/tx-decision?gas=usdc&urgency=flexible"

# Paid response (any x402 client):
# {
#   "submit": true, "verdict": "SETTLE_NOW",
#   "fee": {"max_fee_per_gas_gwei": 0.011, "max_priority_fee_per_gas_gwei": 0.001},
#   "estimated_cost": {"gas": 55000, "usd": 0.0011},
#   "recheck_in_s": null, "as_of_block": 48941850
# }
#
# The loop is one line:
#   if decision.submit: send(tx, decision.fee)

setup: No account or API key — any x402 client with a USDC-funded wallet on Base.
JS: `npm i @x402/fetch` then wrap fetch with your wallet client.
